stemHtml: The decision speed at take-off (V1) is the calibrated airspeed…

options.a: at which the failure of the critical engine is expected to occur.
options.b: below which take-off must be rejected if an engine failure is recognised, above which take-off must be continued.
options.c: below which the take-off must be continued.
options.d: at which the take-off must be rejected.
